name: Lynn Roberts
abstract: Lynn Roberts (born Leonore Theresa Raisig; January 9, 1935  – January 21, 2017) was an American big band singer.

concerts.label: The New York Pops: Doc's Big Band Salute to Skitch
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: It’s Been a Long, Long Time

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Andre
about_quotes.evidence: a very famous vocalist was on that band... Lynn Roberts — she was on that band and I think I was 17 and she was like 15
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Andre interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 7, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Loren Schoenberg
about_quotes.evidence: And did another concert with Milt Grayson who had sung with Duke Ellington’s band, and Lynn Roberts.
about_quotes.doc_title: Loren Schoenberg interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 14, 2019
